# omada_site (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `device_account_setting` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--device_account_setting))
- `name` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `scenario` (String)
- `time_zone` (String)

### Optional

- `address` (String)
- `latitude` (Number)
- `longitude` (Number)
- `support_es` (Boolean)
- `support_l2` (Boolean)
- `tag_ids` (List of String)
- `type` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `site_id` (String)

### Nested Schema for `device_account_setting`

Required:

- `password` (String, Sensitive)
